Bundled QR code encoder used by LAN Screen Share share card.

Source origin:
- qrcode-terminal vendor/QRCode implementation
- Original author: Kazuhiko Arase
- Original header in source states the implementation is licensed under the MIT license.

The bundled browser file in www/assets/share_card_qr.bundle.js is a local adaptation for browser use.
Keep the original attribution header at the top of the bundled file when redistributing.
